Choicemeal Dali

Cho Mi (Cuo Mi) Kung Fu Cuisine · Signature Soup (Dali Branch)

← Back to all restaurants
★★★★★ 4.5
📍 Dali District, Taichung📅 2026
Craft cuisine Taiwanese Family-style Signature soup
Choicemeal (厝秘) is all about "Gongfu" dishes and signature soups—essentially the high-skill, time-intensive heavy hitters of Taiwanese cuisine. At its heart, the restaurant is a tribute to the legacy of the "Zong-pu-shi" (the master chefs behind traditional outdoor banquets known as "Ban-zhuo"), taking those rustic feast traditions and elevating them into a refined dining experience. Their Dali branch on Guoguang Road is tucked right near the local flower market, housed in a stunning standalone building. It features several VIP private rooms, each with floor-to-ceiling windows looking out onto a zen Japanese garden with manicured pines. Perfect for family gatherings, formal banquets, and special celebrations. You can’t go wrong with their signature Su-Hang Dongpo Pork, which surprisingly comes with baguettes and sauerkraut, or the Shredded Pork in Sweet Bean Sauce that you wrap up in thin pancakes with colorful sides. Other crowd-pleasers include the Truffle Scrambled Eggs (served with six slices of baguette), the rich Crab Roe Tofu Pot, and the refreshing Fruit Salad Shrimp—every one of them a classic example of expert "Gongfu" cooking. Even the rice is a standout; they use local Wufeng aromatic rice, which is perfectly chewy with a natural hint of taro. Just a heads-up: the big-ticket items like the White Cabbage & Free-range Chicken Pot or the Sesame Oil Braised Duck need to be pre-ordered, and they're best shared with a big group. Perfect for foodies, family reunions, and those looking to experience elevated traditional Taiwanese flavors.
Good for Family gatherings Formal banquets Special celebrations

What I ordered

Braised Pork Belly (Dongpo Pork; Su Hang Dong Po Rou) Shredded Pork with Sweet Bean Sauce (Jing Jiang Pa Rou Si) Scrambled Eggs with Black Truffle (Song Lu Hua Dan) Tofu and Crab Roe Clay Pot (Xie Huang Dou Fu Bao) Shrimp with Fruit Salad (Shui Guo Sha La Xia) Golden Salted Egg Yolk Crispy Tofu (Jin Sha Nen Dou Fu) Stir-fried White Water Snowflake (Qing Chao Shui Lian) Clam Soup with Shredded Radish (Luo Bo Si Ge Li Tang)

Restaurant info
